questionHtml: Predict the changes to the graph when the magnet is dropped from a lower height above the coil.
markschemeHtml:
magnet moves slower ✓

overall time «for interaction» will be longer ✓

peaks will be smaller ✓

areas will be the same as before ✓

 

Allow a graphical interpretation for MP2 as “graph more spread out”

meta.title: Predict the changes to the graph when the magnet is dropped from a lower height above the coil.
